0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"First Steps"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"A hands-on walkthrough of Mnemosyne's core operations."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"1. Initialize Memory"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\nprint(f\"Initialized: {mem.db_path}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"2. Store Information"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Simple memory\nmem.remember(\"Alice is a backend engineer who prefers Go over Python.\")\n\n# Structured memory with metadata\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Project deadline moved to Friday.\",\n  metadata={\"project\": \"alpha\", \"type\": \"deadline\"},\n  importance=0.8,\n  source=\"slack\",\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"3. Recall Information"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Semantic search\nresults = mem.recall(\"What programming language does Alice prefer?\")\n\n# Filtered search by topic and date\nresults = mem.recall(\n  query=\"deadline\",\n  topic=\"project-alpha\",\n  from_date=\"2026-04-01\",\n)\n\n# Access a specific memory from results\nfor r in results:\n  print(f\"{r['score']:.3f}: {r['content']}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"4. Update and Delete"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Update a memory\nmem.update(\"abc123def\", content=\"Deadline moved to Monday.\")\n\n# Delete a memory\nmem.forget(\"abc123def\")\n\n# No bulk delete — iterate through results\nresults = mem.recall(\"temp notes\", top_k=10)\nfor r in results:\n  mem.forget(r[\"id\"])\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"5. Inspect Memory State"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Statistics\nstats = mem.get_stats()\nprint(f\"Total: {stats['total_memories']} memories across {stats['total_sessions']} sessions\")\nprint(f\"BEAM working: {stats['beam']['working_memory']}\")\nprint(f\"BEAM episodic: {stats['beam']['episodic_memory']}\")\nprint(f\"Triples: {stats['beam']['triples']['total']}\")\nprint(f\"Database: {stats['database']}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"You're Ready"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["You've learned the core CRUD operations.
